prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.8L 12v VR6 (AAA engine code) with a Schrick 272° camshaft, ported and polished cylinder heads by Autotech, and a custom 6-3-1 stainless steel header by Supersprint paired with a 2.5" straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimal scavenging

Garrett GT2860R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom VR6-specific manifold by DieselGeek, upgraded fuel system with Bosch 044 fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors, and a standalone Megasquirt MS3Pro ECU with VR6-specific ignition and fuel maps

Bilstein B16 PSS9 coilovers with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (20mm drop), polybushings by 034 Motorsport for the subframe and control arms, and a Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar with adjustable end links to eliminate body roll
estetica: OEM+ Euro-spec MK3 GTI front bumper with Hella E-code headlights and clear turn signals, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a functional NACA duct for VR6 heat extraction
Rear diffuser by VW Heritage with integrated dual 3" exhaust cutouts, OEM-style BBS RS 15" wheels refinished in gold with 195/50/15 Falken Azenis RT-615K tires for period-correct stance

Full interior retrim in black Alcantara with red stitching by Recaro, featuring SRD (Sport Recaro Design) front seats with integrated 4-point Schroth harnesses and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub
